cases.prompt: Help me set up a design system and create a DESIGN.md for my new app.

assertions.text: Creates a DESIGN.md as the project's design source of truth
Proposes a complete design system covering aesthetic, typography, color, layout, spacing, and motion
Generates font and color preview pages for the proposed system

cases.prompt: 새 프로젝트 브랜드 가이드라인이랑 디자인 시스템 잡아줘.

assertions.text: Understands the product and researches the competitive design landscape before proposing
Produces DESIGN.md capturing the design decisions

cases.prompt: We already have a live site. Can you design a system based on what it already looks like?

assertions.text: For an existing site, points the user toward /plan-design-review to infer the system rather than starting fresh
